news.title:
Axiscades Technologies forms UAE subsidiary, AXISCADES Technologies Aviation Equipment Engineering Services LLC.
New subsidiary focuses on aerospace sector with capital of 150,000 dirhams to explore UAE opportunities.
news.summary:
Axiscades Technologies forms UAE subsidiary, AXISCADES Technologies Aviation Equipment Engineering Services LLC.
New subsidiary focuses on aerospace sector with capital of 150,000 dirhams to explore UAE opportunities.

news.title: AXISCADES approves buying remaining 24% stake in Cades Studec for $1.5M.
news.summary: AXISCADES approves buying remaining 24% stake in Cades Studec for $1.5M.

news.title:
Axiscades Technologies approves acquisition of 24% stake in CSTI, making it a wholly owned subsidiary.
Transaction valued at USD 1.5M; completion expected by June 2026, subject to preconditions.
news.summary:
Axiscades Technologies approves acquisition of 24% stake in CSTI, making it a wholly owned subsidiary.

news.title:
AXISCADES partners to enhance India's space monitoring capabilities.
Collaboration focuses on advanced tech for tracking space assets.
news.summary:
AXISCADES partners to enhance India's space monitoring capabilities.
Collaboration focuses on advanced tech for tracking space assets.

news.title:
Axiscades signs agreement at French Embassy, New Delhi, with ministerial presence.
Deal aims to improve India’s Space Situational Awareness; Axiscades serves aerospace, defense.
news.summary:
Axiscades signs agreement at French Embassy, New Delhi, with ministerial presence.

news.title:
Axiscades Tech Q3 FY25 net sales rose 18.6% YoY to Rs 123.05 cr.
Net profit dropped 16.2% YoY to Rs 3.17 cr; EPS declined to Rs 0.75.
news.summary:
Axiscades Tech Q3 FY25 net sales rose 18.6% YoY to Rs 123.05 cr.
Net profit dropped 16.2% YoY to Rs 3.17 cr; EPS declined to Rs 0.75.

news.title: AXISCADES secures ₹25 crore contract to supply avionics for LCA MK1A jets.
news.summary: AXISCADES secures ₹25 crore contract to supply avionics for LCA MK1A jets.

news.title:
Axiscades Technologies' subsidiary, Mistral Solutions, secured a Rs. 25 crore order from Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd.
The order involves supplying Single Board Computers over multiple years, with no promoter-related interests.
news.summary:
Axiscades Technologies' subsidiary, Mistral Solutions, secured a Rs. 25 crore order from Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd.
The order involves supplying Single Board Computers over multiple years, with no promoter-related interests.

news.title:
AXISCADES plans to change its revenue mix to 61:39 by FY27, aided by new facilities and customer focus.
Power930 vision targets INR9,000 Cr by 2030, with INR14,000 Cr pipeline over 4 years; capex extends till FY28.
news.summary:
AXISCADES plans to change its revenue mix to 61:39 by FY27, aided by new facilities and customer focus.
Power930 vision targets INR9,000 Cr by 2030, with INR14,000 Cr pipeline over 4 years; capex extends till FY28.

news.title:
Axiscades Technologies aims Rs. 9,000 Cr revenue by 2030.
Company projects 25% YoY growth in Q3 FY26.
news.summary:
Axiscades Technologies aims Rs. 9,000 Cr revenue by 2030.
Company projects 25% YoY growth in Q3 FY26.

news.title:
Axiscades Tech to join 'Sashakt Bharat' Aerospace & Defence meet on Feb 16, 2026.
Investor interactions in Mumbai include one-on-one and group meetings; no sensitive info shared.
news.summary:

news.title:
AXISCADES Technologies Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹628M from ₹404M YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 18.3% from 14.7% YoY, reflecting strong growth.
news.summary:

The order boosts local production initiatives, strengthening domestic manufacturing.

news.title:
Axiscades' Mistral wins ₹80 cr LCA Mk1A avionics hardware order, enhancing DRDO & HAL ties.
Products include mission computer, multifunction displays; made at Devanahalli Atmanirbhar facility.

news.title:
AXISCADES Technologies' board to meet on Feb 9, 2026, to review unaudited financial results for Dec 31, 2025.
Trading window for AXISCADES shares closed from Jan 1 to Feb 11, 2026, as per SEBI norms.

The surge follows new orders secured from two US-based companies.
